The short version of why: 10 years building product in dynamic industries like social media, leading teams of 20+. Early to AI too: I built one of the first AI SaaS products in 2021. It was powered by GPT-3 during its private beta.
Since then I've shipped AI-first products to 25M+ users, generated $50M+ in pipeline, raised $3M from VCs, trained purpose-built models with cutting-edge techniques, and filed a patent that cuts conversational AI costs by 90%.
In the last few months I've gone deeper into AI productivity directly: side projects, the latest tools, mentoring startups, rebuilding my workflows for an AI-led world. Moda is exactly where I want to do that next.
